Wanda is a character that doth not appear within the narrative, needless to say. And thus the particular details on her are scarse. The name, Wanda, is a reference to the titular Venus in *Venus and Furs*; Wanda beynge a real-life individual and thus the Venus is meant to be a quixotic representation of them.
Indeed, now if askynge about *why* Wanda is portrayede in such a way that is a more subjective discussion. As neither B.I.A.V. knowen and the only way to do so is to inquireth the original writer.
Oh is that a quote from that one Hertzfeldt movie
Telling someone to waste their pulls on a bad character, without telling them the weaknesses is something I will never abide by
If you are a guide maker and telling someone that pollux is the best unit for their account, that is poison.
When in fact, even you can't make them work
I showcase me clearing content with him at a higher lvl than other ppl and then say his weaknesses.
They glaze the unit and get newbies to waste their hard earned pulls.
idk man, the pollux guide i did see did explain why his bleed is good and how to synergise him
as well as the breakpoints where he becomes a carry and how he works in a team when he has less
is it good for endgmae, good for an account overall? no. Can they consistently clear a5? hell no, that person doesn't even do it
when you tell ppl about things you DIDN'T do
you are a shit person. Period.
Pollux is very good unit, i want to get him one day <:heh:1439677003019321476>
Do they coach, do they actually interact with new players who want to clear endgame? No, they put out their fake guides and bait newbies that I have to help fix their account one day
honestly i dont even know who you're talking about anymore. most pollux guides i saw were documents which explained why his playstyle is not the most straightforward but still workable
Flares is off his meds again <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
the proclaimed twink destroyer didnt pull for pollux??
If anyone bricks their acc via males, I just want you to know. You deserved it <:Wait:1400771580757409844>
I don't think it's easy to brick tho
That is a quote from the first  World of Tomorrow yes. Wow you’re the first person that asked me about it after three years. 🫡
i always found it weird that people talk about bricking their accounts, it's not like light personally bans you from playing the game
If you are going to present pulling for x unit is fine if its for fun, ok. But pretending its meta and good for you account is something I will never stand by
It's difficult to brick. Pulling for oe as f2p early is one way
you can clear all normal mode content with ramona ogier lotan doll
A bit fake due to the wheel investment
its just whether you care about chasing leaderboards and rose scrips or not
my point is that theres "not optimal" and then theres "struggles with basic content"
and theres a very wide range you have before i would call an account "bricked"
besides, it's the kind of game where you can just spend 200 more dollars, or grind a couple more weeks, and your account is already unbricked
so was it really bricked to begin with
Being unable to speed run through main story immediately would count as a soft brick
what the hell is a soft brick
You need to wait to unbrick
anyway im just quibbling about terminology this is a nothing burger
i just think brick is the wrong word probably
Clay, the account is kinda clay
It slips right through d tide and main story
Anyways, if you want a moistened account. Go kath e3 then straight to titan's blade +12
